meta.title: Tramar Muro Alto
meta.description: Two studio flats curated with Pernambucan craft at Makai Acqua Resort, Muro Alto. Caruaru ceramics, renaissance lace, attentive rest.

announcement: Pernambuco craft curation · Two studios at Makai Acqua Resort · Muro Alto

hero.tagline: Woven with the best Pernambuco has to offer.
hero.subtitle: Two studio flats at Makai Acqua Resort, Muro Alto. A curation of Pernambucan craft.
hero.imageAlt: Tropical beach of Muro Alto, Pernambuco

curadoria.title: What we bring
curadoria.text: Each flat is curated with Pernambucan craft. The ceramics you use at breakfast come from Caruaru. The lace on the pillow is renascença from Pesqueira. The textiles passed from hand to hand, not from a catalog. Curation is the core of Tramar.
curadoria.imageAlt: Hands shaping handcrafted ceramics from Caruaru

manifesto.text: We believe resting well is paying attention. Attention to the weave of the hammock, the clay of the cup, the sound of the tide, the time that passes differently when no one is in a hurry. Tramar is a beach house woven with the best Pernambuco has to offer: the artisan's hand, the craft of those who make, the calm of those who live by the sea. You arrive, you rest, and you leave with a thread of this weave.
manifesto.p1Text: We reject generic plastic and staged folklore. We value the porosity of fired clay and the patient stitches of true lacework.
manifesto.p2Text: We slow the traveller's landing. A quiet retreat where shadows move gently along the light-washed walls.
manifesto.p3Text: Grounded on Pernambuco's southern coast. A contemporary tribute that honours the handcrafted treasures of our hillsides and hinterlands.

carua.name: Tramar Caruá
carua.tagline: Beachfront studio with the weight of Caruaru clay and the fiber of Atlantic forest. For 2 to 3 guests.

renda.name: Tramar Renda
renda.tagline: Beachfront studio with the lightness of renaissance lace and the light of Olinda facades. For 2 to 3 guests.

inteira.name: Tramar Inteira
inteira.tagline: The whole house, the whole weave, the whole rest. Up to 8 guests.

studios.title: Choose Your Stay
studios.subtitle: Each space is a self-contained retreat curated with pieces by local Pernambuco artisans.

carua.details: Morning coffee in raw clay pottery · Rustic cotton throw · Soft candlelight

renda.details: Bobbin lace cushions · Pure linen gauze curtains · Olinda Blue tones

inteira.details: Two integrated studios · Private antechamber · Two curated kitchens

makai.title: Makai Acqua Resort
makai.text: Tramar flats are at Makai Acqua Resort, in Muro Alto, 50 minutes from Recife. Your stay includes full access to the resort: the water complex, the restaurant, the fitness center, and the kids area.

gallery.title: The house in images
gallery.item4: Natural pools of Porto de Galinhas

location.title: Where we are
location.text: Makai Acqua Resort, Muro Alto, Pernambuco. 50 minutes from Recife airport. 8 minutes from Porto de Galinhas natural pools.
location.pdgText: Porto de Galinhas natural pools are 8 minutes from Makai Acqua Resort. You wake up on the balcony, have coffee in the house ceramics, and minutes later you are at Pernambuco's most celebrated coastline.
location.pdgCaption: Porto de Galinhas natural pools — 8 min from Makai

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How many guests fit in each studio and in the full house?
faq.a1: Each studio (Caruá and Renda) comfortably accommodates up to 3 guests — 1 queen bed and 1 single sofa bed. When booking Tramar Inteira, the private combination of both studios, we welcome groups of up to 8 guests with complete privacy.
faq.a2: We accept small pets with prior consultation and approval before booking, to ensure compliance with the Makai Acqua Resort condominium rules. Please get in touch before reserving.
faq.q3: How do check-in and check-out times work?
faq.a3: Check-in starts from 3 PM and check-out must be completed by 11 AM. For early arrivals or flexible departures, please contact us in advance so we can check calendar availability.
faq.a4: Full and complimentary access to all Makai Acqua Resort facilities: lazy river and aquatic playground, beachside bar and restaurant, air-conditioned gym, beach tennis courts, games room, and kids club.
faq.a5: Yes. The resort offers free, secure private parking with 24-hour concierge. Each studio reservation includes 1 assigned indoor parking space.
faq.a6: We follow Airbnb's standard moderate policy: full refund for cancellations made up to 5 days before check-in. Full details can be reviewed directly on the platform listing before confirming your reservation.
